title: RunSignup Race
description: Represents a race or endurance event on the RunSignup platform. A race is the top-level container that holds one or more events (e.g., 5K, 10K, Half Marathon). The race object includes general information, location, registration settings, and links to events.

race_id.description: Unique race identifier assigned by RunSignup.

next_date.description: The date of the next upcoming event in MM/DD/YYYY format.

next_end_date.description: The end date of the next upcoming event in MM/DD/YYYY format.

is_draft_race.description: Whether this race is in draft mode (not published).

is_private_race.description: Whether this race is private (invitation only).

created.description: Date the race was created in the system.

last_modified.description: Date the race was last modified.

city.description: City where the race is held.

state.description: US state abbreviation where the race is held.

country_code.description: ISO country code for the race location.

zip.description: Postal code for the race location.

description.description: HTML or plain text description of the race.

url.description: RunSignup registration page URL for the race.

external_race_url.description: External race website URL provided by the race director.

logo_url.description: URL to the race logo image.

charity_id.description: ID of the charity associated with this race for fundraising.

events.description: List of events within this race (e.g., 5K, 10K, Half Marathon).

Event.description: A specific event distance or category within a race. Participants register for a specific event.

event_id.description: Unique event identifier within the race.

start_time.description: Event start time in the race's local timezone.

max_participants.description: Maximum number of participants allowed. Null means unlimited.

registration_opens.description: Date/time when registration opens for this event.

registration_closes.description: Date/time when registration closes for this event.

Participant.description: A registered participant in a race event.

dob.description: Date of birth in MM/DD/YYYY format.

Result.description: A race result entry for a participant including place and finish time.

registration_id.description: Links this result to the participant's registration.

chip_time.description: Net chip time from crossing start line (HH:MM:SS.ms format).

place_overall.description: Overall finish place across all genders and ages.

place_gender.description: Finish place within the participant's gender category.

place_division.description: Finish place within the participant's age/gender division.

pace.description: Pace per mile or kilometer (MM:SS format).
